2402840.name: The Last Case of Benedict Fox Soundtrack
2402840.description:
A massive mansion. A mysterious death. A final case to be solved. Immerse yourself in the twisted world of The Last Case of Benedict Fox, a Metroidvania inspired by Lovecraft, noir, and 20th-century jazz.

Set in the Roaring Twenties, the visuals and music of Benedict Fox pay homage to the era. The jubilant jazz music juxtaposes with dark ambient tones to create a unique soundscape for Benedict’s world. Explore the mansion, limbo, and everything in between with these exclusive 28 tracks.
